description: Urban platform contracts grouped by family: provider ingestion, internal platform objects, and consumer-facing outputs/APIs. Backward-compatible aliases preserved.

urban_decision_packet_core.description: Domain-neutral decision packet shell (H3 cell, review workflow, generic prediction/evidence blobs). Use for new domains before adding a strict profile.

decision_packet.description: Alias for the default strict profile (air quality PM2.5 MVP). Prefer `decision_packet_air_quality` in new integrations.

decision_packet_air_quality.description: Strict profile: PM2.5, India bands, AQ + weather + fire provenance fields emitted by the current pipeline.

decision_packets.description: Root array for decision_packets.json (items follow the default strict profile in v1).

data_audit.description: Grid + observation coverage audit for the AQ pipeline (v1 field names are AQ-oriented). Other domains should add e.g. `data_audit.profile.traffic.v1.schema.json`.

metrics.description: Run metrics envelope (minimal required subset); model blocks vary by domain.

provenance_summary.description: Compact provenance object embedded in packets/metrics (v1 keys lean on spatial + station language from AQ).

source_reliability.description: Per-entity reliability table (variable-agnostic: pm25, speed_mph, water_depth_m, …).

scale_analysis.description: H3 resolution vs observation density (reusable across domains that use H3 + point sensors).

provider_air_quality_observation_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: AQ observations as emitted by providers.

provider_weather_observation_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: weather observations as emitted by providers.

provider_fire_event_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: fire events as emitted by providers.

provider_building_footprint_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: building footprints / polygons.

provider_road_network_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: road network / linework.

provider_video_camera_people_count_feed.description: People count feed from video cameras.

provider_rainfall_observation_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: rainfall observations (intensity/accumulation) as emitted by providers.

provider_flood_incident_feed.description: Raw ingestion contract: flood/waterlogging incident records (tickets/dispatch/field reports).

platform_observation.description: Normalized internal observation object (matches standards.schemas Observation).

platform_entity.description: Normalized internal entity object (matches standards.schemas Entity).

platform_feature.description: Normalized internal feature object (matches standards.schemas Feature).

platform_event.description: Normalized internal event object (matches standards.schemas Event).

consumer_urban_decision_packet_core.description: Consumer contract: core decision packet shell (copy of current core schema).

consumer_decision_packet_air_quality.description: Consumer contract: strict air-quality decision packet profile (copy of current profile).

consumer_decision_packets_air_quality.description: Consumer contract: decision packets array for air-quality profile.

consumer_recommendation_response.description: Consumer contract: recommendations API response wrapper.

consumer_observation_response.description: Consumer contract: observations API response wrapper.

consumer_feature_response.description: Consumer contract: features API response wrapper.

consumer_source_reliability_response.description: Consumer contract: source reliability API response wrapper.

consumer_flood_risk_dashboard.description: Consumer contract: flood risk dashboard payload (situational awareness + review queue).

consumer_flood_decision_packet.description: Consumer contract: flood decision packet profile (domain_id=flood_risk).

consumer_field_verification_task.description: Consumer contract: field verification task (referenced by decision packets and review workflows).

openapi_platform_api.description: OpenAPI stub for consumer-facing platform API.

openapi_provider_ingestion_api.description: OpenAPI stub for provider ingestion API.
